rationale: The rule governs elections to revoke county equalization tax under former Chapter 18. It does not reference homestead exemptions or Tax Code §11.13(b), so no conflict arises.
quote: The commissioners court of a county to which this subchapter applies may order an election on the question of revoking the county equalization tax
_note: No direct or indirect interaction between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this county equalization tax revocation election provision.
